====={{aniseries|JN}}=====
[[File:Steven Stone JN.png|250px|thumb|left|Steven in ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'']]
Steven appeared in a fantasy in ''[[JN105|Reuniting for the First Time!]]'', when {{Ash}} mentioned him to [[Wallace]].

In ''[[JN109|Aim For The Eight!]]'', Steven was revealed to be in the Master Class of the [[World Coronation Series]], being ranked third. 

Steven appeared in a fantasy in ''[[JN114|Friends, Rivals, Lend Me Your Spirit!]]'', when [[Goh]] mentioned him to [[Paul]].
[[File:Ash and Steven.png|thumb|250px|Steven and Ash]]
In ''[[JN115|Curtain Up! Fight the Fights!]]'', Steven participated in the [[Masters Eight Tournament]], along with the rest of the Masters Eight, reuniting with Ash, Alain, and Diantha, and meeting {{an|Iris}} and the other regional Champions. When it was revealed that Ash would be his first opponent, Steven revealed that he would finally have the chance to battle him. When asked by {{an|Lance}} if he knew Alain, Steven replied that he knew him through the Key Stones excavations and also revealed that he hoped Alain would not be overwhelmed by {{an|Leon}} in the very first match of the tournament.

After watching the other battles in the [[JN116|following]] [[JN117|episodes]], Steven and Ash began their battle. In ''[[JN118|Battling as Hard as Stone!]]'', Steven was able to hold his own against Ash, but was defeated by the [[Alola]] Champion, making him the fourth person to be eliminated from the tournament. Following his loss, Steven wished Ash good luck for the remainder of the competition and returned to Hoenn. 

In ''[[JN129|A Flood of Torrential Gains!]]'', Steven watched Ash's match against Leon.
{{-}}
